name: Air fryer chicken and potatoes
description: Chicken pieces and cut potatoes in the air fryer. Season, set time, check once.

name: Microwave oatmeal
description: Oats and water in a bowl, microwave, stir, add toppings.

name: Rice cooker rice and frozen vegetables
description: Rice and water in the rice cooker; add frozen vegetables for the last part. No watching needed.

name: Instant pot lentil soup
description: Lentils, broth, and vegetables in the instant pot. Set it and wait. Pressure release is a loud step.

name: Toaster oven cheese toast
description: Bread and cheese in the toaster oven until melted.

name: Air fryer frozen dumplings
description: Frozen dumplings in the air fryer. Shake once partway.

name: Kettle instant noodles
description: Boil water in the kettle, pour over noodles, wait, eat.

name: Microwave scrambled eggs
description: Beat eggs in a mug, microwave in short bursts, stir between.

name: Instant pot rice and beans
description: Rice, beans, water, and seasoning in the instant pot. Pressure release is a loud step.

name: Toaster oven roasted vegetables
description: Cut vegetables with oil on the tray, toaster oven until soft.
